4939.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
4939.description: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives.

5224.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
5224.description: By the late 1990's the Lebanese Australian community is being terrorised by a violent criminal minority enforcing the drug racket with extreme violence (2/4).
